overall.description: A first-person perspective drive through a futuristic urban underpass in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along a wet multi-lane road beneath a massive concrete overpass with linear fluorescent lighting, while neon-lit city buildings are visible through the side openings. Several futuristic vehicles pass by as the camera transitions from the sheltered underpass to an open street with modern street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: black sedan passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through the covered underpass beneath the concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the camera on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and support structure of the highway overpass
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling of the underpass
smooth concrete wall running along the left side of the road
metal guardrail with continuous red LED accent lighting
dark wet asphalt surface with double yellow lane markings
futuristic city buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs visible through openings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins deep within a concrete highway underpass, illuminated by linear fluorescent ceiling lights. The camera moves forward along the wet asphalt road, with a concrete retaining wall on the left and a guardrail with red LED accents on the right. Through the openings on the right, a distant neon-lit cityscape is visible in the foggy night. A black sedan passes by on the right at moderate speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved section of underpass with dense vehicle traffic

events.description: yellow sports car speeds past on the right
brown vintage-style car drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the curved underpass as multiple futuristic vehicles overtake

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding past the camera
brown vintage car with white stripe driving past

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through a gently curving section of the underpass, with the neon cityscape drawing closer on the right side. Traffic density increases as a yellow sports car followed by a brown vintage vehicle speed past on the right. The concrete support pillars and linear ceiling lights remain consistent as the road curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching tunnel exit with visible daylight ahead

events.description: teal sports car passes by on the right
natural ambient light becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead, mixing with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the underpass with increasing natural light visible ahead

notable_agents.action: teal sports car overtaking on the right

entered.detail: bright white light visible at the end of the underpass indicating the exit opening

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the end of the underpass, a bright light marking the exit becomes visible in the distance. The lighting gradually shifts from purely artificial to a mix of ceiling lights and natural ambient light from the exit. A teal sports car passes by on the right, and the concrete retaining wall continues along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with modern street lighting and road markings

events.description: exits the covered underpass into open air with visible night sky and street lamps

agents.ego_description: driving out of the underpass onto the open road with street lighting and visible sky

entered.detail: tall modern street lamp with horizontal linear LED light fixture
dark night sky visible above the road
large white painted text reading SLOW on the asphalt surface
bushes and small plants along the left roadside

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the underpass into an open urban street, revealing the night sky above. A modern street lamp with a horizontal LED fixture stands on the right, and the road features large white SLOW markings. The concrete overpass structure and ceiling lights are now behind, while vegetation lines the left roadside and distant city structures are visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the depths of a concrete highway underpass into the open expanse of a neon-lit urban street. It begins deep within the sheltered tunnel, gliding along wet asphalt beneath linear fluorescent ceiling lights while a black sedan passes by against a backdrop of a distant, foggy cityscape. As the road gently curves, the neon city draws closer and traffic density increases with a yellow sports car and a brown vintage vehicle speeding past. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the exit, where the artificial ceiling glow blends with the ambient light of the city and a teal sports car flashes by on the right. Finally, the camera breaks free from the concrete structure into the open night air, passing a modern LED street lamp and white road markings as vegetation and towering city structures emerge ahead.
